error_signature: The service was not able to process your request
title: Insufficient credits in PiAPI for text to image node
symptom: When using the text to image node in n8n, the error 'The service was not able to process your request' appears, indicating a problem with processing the request.
applies_when: Using the text to image node
not_this_if: Sufficient credits are available in the PiAPI account
root_cause: The error occurs because the PiAPI service requires a certain number of credits to process requests. If the account does not have enough credits, the service cannot fulfill the request, leading to this error message.
fix_steps: Log in to your PiAPI account
Check the credits available in your account
If credits are low, purchase additional credits
Retry the request in n8n after adding credits
agent_instruction: Ensure you have sufficient credits in your PiAPI account and retry the request.
